title: Cassiopeia
description: A simple mod that adds a chatbot to your Minecraft chat specifically for use to guide players in Hypixel Skyblock!
body:
# **Cassiopeia – Multi-AI Chat Integration for Minecraft**

Cassiopeia is a client-side Fabric mod that integrates multiple AI models into the Minecraft chat system. Players can send prompts to their chosen AI directly in-game and receive real-time responses.

## Features

* **Multi-AI Support**: Choose between **Gemini 2.5 Flash**, **GPT-5**, **Grok**, and **Claude 3 Sonnet**.
* **Game State Integration**: AI can see what item your holding and armour your wearing and more
* **Local Storage**: API keys, prompts, and history are stored locally — never shared with anyone except your selected AI provider.
* **Conversation Memory**: Remembers your last 5 exchanges for conversational consistency.

## Usage

```
/ai
```

— Shows all available commands and usage info in-game.

```
/ai <prompt>
```

— Send a prompt to the currently configured AI model.

```
/ai api <model> <key>
```

— Save your API key for a model (**Gemini**, **OpenAI**, **grok**, **Claude**).

```
/ai model <name>
```

— Switch to a different AI model.

```
/ai clear
```

— Clear stored conversation history.

## Get Your API Keys

* [Gemini API Key (Google)](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey) (free with a Google account)
* [OpenAI API Key (GPT-5)](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
* [xAI API Key (Grok)](https://x.ai](https://docs.x.ai/docs/api-reference#api-key))
* [Anthropic API Key (Claude 3)](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/get-started)

## Community

For **support, suggestions, and early info on new updates**, join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/9GcrUSeSvF).
